paragraphs: I'm Swar — a 19-year-old developer from Navi Mumbai. I build things that actually leave localhost. Between holding an 8.365 GPA and drinking a questionable amount of coffee, I engineer full-stack MERN applications that look cinematic and don't fall apart under pressure.

I ship. A 3D space telemetry dashboard that cracked Top 8 in a 100+ team hackathon. A college management system that 500+ students open every single day. If it goes on a screen, it should feel like someone actually cared about making it.
I also teach — version control workshops for college peers, software concepts on YouTube. Turns out explaining something is the fastest way to find out if you actually understand it.
Outside the IDE: riding my bike, losing at chess, planning the next hackathon, and occasionally cooking something that doesn't embarrass me.
